ddls:
CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MEP who cast the vote */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., for, against, abstain) */,
  "vote_group" TEXT /* Political group the MEP belongs to */,
  "vote_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vote event */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the vote belongs to */,
  "vote_comment" TEXT /* Comments or reasons for the vote */,
  "vote_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_mep_id FOREIGN KEY ("mep_id") REFERENCES mePs ("mep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_vote_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("vote_identifier") REFERENCES vote_events ("vote_identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "mePs" (
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MEP */,
  "mep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the MEP */,
  "political_group" TEXT /* Political group the MEP belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the MEP represents */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the MEP started their term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the MEP ended their term (if applicable) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the MEP */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the MEP */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the MEP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mePs_political_group FOREIGN KEY ("political_group") REFERENCES political_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mePs_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each political group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the political group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political group */,
  "num_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote event */,
  "vote_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the vote event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the vote event took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vote event */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion being voted on */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the event belongs to */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of MEPs present during the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vote_events_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motions" (
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion */,
  "motion_text" TEXT /* Text of the motion */,
  "motion_type" TEXT /* Type of the motion (e.g., resolution, amendment) */,
  "proposer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MEP who proposed the motion */,
  "proposer_group" TEXT /* Political group of the MEP who proposed the motion */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date the motion was proposed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the motion (e.g., adopted, rejected) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the motion */,
  "related_motion_id" INTEGER /* ID of a related motion for context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motions_proposer_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposer_id") REFERENCES proposers ("proposer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposers" (
  "proposer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposer */,
  "mep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MEP who proposed the motion */,
  "mep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the MEP who proposed the motion */,
  "political_group" TEXT /* Political group of the MEP who proposed the motion */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the MEP represents */,
  "num_proposals" INTEGER /* Number of motions proposed by the MEP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposers_mep_id FOREIGN KEY ("mep_id") REFERENCES mePs ("mep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., vote_id, motion_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES motions ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES votes ("vote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO country code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "num_meps" INTEGER /* Number of MEPs representing the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
